My Analysis:
I agree with option **A**.
The provided evidence reinforces that composites consist of both soft resin matrices and harder filler particles. Effective polishing requires special attention since overly aggressive techniques might harm the softer parts while leaving rough spots unattended on the harder ones. The mention of specialized polishing equipment further highlights the necessity to match the right tool and technique according to the material's varying degrees of hardness.
Therefore,
\boxed{A}
